text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's first G1 race is finally
happening tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's in my bag. I even remembered to pack a
spare pair of shoes.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And I've made sure they're properly
attached.
...Trainer, please try to relax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to help her relax, but she ends up
comforting me instead.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm getting a call. Please excuse me for a moment.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hello? Father? Yes, I'm doing well.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
choice_data_list: Was that your parents calling to cheer you on?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's right. ...Hehehe! Father was checking to see
if I forgot anything, just like you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Everyone around me is always more nervous than
I am before a race!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I told him I'm definitely going to win, but he still
just told me to be careful not to get injured.
choice_data_list: I think that's what's most important to him.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You might be right. My parents have never once
told me to win. They've always been so gentle
with me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And that's precisely why I want to win tomorrow's
race.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I aspire to become an illustrious runner and to
bring honor to my parents by being the first to
realize our family's dream.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Despite being so busy, Mother and Father have
both always dedicated themselves to advancing
the Umamusume world.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'd like to reward them for all their hard work! ♪
choice_data_list:
You'll have to give them something fantastic,
then!

You'll have to give them something fantastic,
then!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Indeed! The Satono family's first G1 victory!
